basic_details.job_title: IIT Guwahati Associate Project Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati (IIT Guwahati)
basic_details.short_information: IIT Guwahati is recruiting 01 Associate Project Engineer at the GATE-JAM Office.

qualification.details: criteria: Details | preferred skills: Proficiency in website design & development using WordPress, Joomla, HTML, CSS, JavaScript, PHP, MySQL, Linux administration, Microsoft Office, and experience in online examination systems (GATE, JAM, JEE etc.) | desired skills: Cloud-based web systems, Bash/Python scripting, web-security best practices
qualification.education_qualification: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) with minimum 60% marks or 7.0 CGPA

how_to_apply: Candidates must send their application along with detailed Curriculum Vitae (CV) and scanned copies of educational qualification & experience certificates to [email protected] by 18 July 2026 (05:00 PM).
Shortlisted candidates will be informed by email and called for the online interview. Selection will be based on performance in the interview.
important_instructions: The appointment is purely contractual. Initial pay will be fixed by the Selection Committee. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. Candidates must ensure they fulfill all eligibility criteria.

content_sections.heading: IIT Guwahati Associate Project Engineer Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: GATE-JAM Office, IIT Guwahati has invited applications for the post of Associate Project Engineer purely on contract basis for one year (renewable for another year based on performance). Download IIT Guwahati Associate Project Engineer Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Guwahati Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: IIT Guwahati is recruiting 01 Associate Project Engineer at the GATE-JAM Office.

rows.details: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) with minimum 60% marks or 7.0 CGPA

Proficiency in website design & development using WordPress, Joomla, HTML, CSS, JavaScript, PHP, MySQL, Linux administration, Microsoft Office, and experience in online examination systems (GATE, JAM, JEE etc.)
Cloud-based web systems, Bash/Python scripting, web-security best practices

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for IIT Guwahati Associate Project Engineer 2026
content_sections.text: Candidates must send their application along with detailed Curriculum Vitae (CV) and scanned copies of educational qualification & experience certificates to [email protected] by 18 July 2026 (05:00 PM). Shortlisted candidates will be informed by email and called for the online interview. Selection will be based on performance in the interview.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: The appointment is purely contractual. Initial pay will be fixed by the Selection Committee. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. Candidates must ensure they fulfill all eligibility criteria.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IIT Guwahati Associate Project Engineer 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to send the application is 18 July 2026 (05:00 PM).

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available at IIT Guwahati GATE-JAM Office?
faq.answer: Only 01 post of Associate Project Engineer is vacant.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for Associate Project Engineer at IIT Guwahati?
faq.answer: Pay scale is ₹35,000 to ₹49,000 per month with annual increment of ₹1,400 plus HRA and medical facilities.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for IIT Guwahati Project Engineer?
faq.answer: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) with minimum 60% marks or 7.0 CGPA.

faq.question: Q5. How to apply for IIT Guwahati Associate Project Engineer position?
faq.answer: Send application with CV and scanned certificates to [email protected] by 18 July 2026.

faq.question: Q6. What is the experience required for IIT Guwahati GATE-JAM recruitment?
faq.answer: Minimum 05 years of relevant work experience is required.

faq.question: Q7. When is the interview for IIT Guwahati Associate Project Engineer?
faq.answer: The online interview (video conferencing) will be held on 23 July 2026 at 10:30 AM.

faq.question: Q8. What technical skills are preferred for this role at IIT Guwahati?
faq.answer: Expertise in WordPress, Joomla, HTML, CSS, PHP, MySQL, Linux server management, and online exam systems like GATE/JAM.

faq.question: Q9. Is the IIT Guwahati position permanent or contractual?
faq.answer: It is a contractual position for 1 year, renewable for another year based on performance.

faq.question: Q10. Will candidates get any travel allowance for the interview?
faq.answer: No TA/DA will be paid as the interview is in online video conferencing mode.
